conversation.text: hey David, saw you're in commercial property. interesting space. what kind of square footage are you guys typically moving?
All sorts really. But look, I've seen these AI things before and they're usually just a glorified FAQ bot. How is this different?

fair point, most tools in this space are pretty generic, same setup for everyone|||what we build is custom to your business so it actually handles a proper qualification flow and sounds like your team. not just firing off canned answers
And the cost? I bet it's thousands.

hard to give a number here as it's scope-based, depends what needs building. but usually it comes in under a month of your ad spend, and we split it 50/50 so it's not all upfront|||Louis can give you an exact figure on a quick call once he sees your setup. worth a look?
